hooks.command: branch="${GIT_PULL_BRANCH:-main}"; git fetch origin "$branch" 2>/dev/null; git pull origin "$branch" --ff-only 2>/dev/null; true

git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet || { git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null; }; unpushed=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$unpushed" -gt 0 ]; then branch=$(git branch --show-current); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"Stop\",\"additionalContext\":\"There are $unpushed unpushed commits on branch $branch. Ask the user if they want to push and to which branch.\"}}"; fi; true
